decision.title: Reference site cockpit is read-only parsed XML
decision.summary: The RepoPlanner apps/landing /cockpit route loads builtin-packs.json, then parses ROADMAP.xml, STATE.xml, and TASK-REGISTRY.xml with fast-xml-parser. List rows reflect committed task status attributes — not hand-written mock rows.
decision.impact: Operators see how a host app can treat planning files as data without a database.

decision.title: Canonical demo planning tree lives in repository .planning/
decision.summary: The same XML under RepoPlanner/.planning is bundled into public/planning-embed/builtin-packs.json at build time and mirrored into the downloadable init bundle under public/init/planning for parity.
decision.impact: One source of truth for docs, demo, and planning init samples.

decision.title: Client parsing uses fast-xml-parser, not embeddings
decision.summary: “Fast” in this stack refers to fast-xml-parser (attribute-aware XML to JS objects). Semantic search or vector embeddings are a separate concern and are not required for the cockpit list views.
decision.impact: Avoid confusing XML parsing with embedding pipelines when reading architecture notes.
